basic_details.job_title: TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Walkin
basic_details.short_information: Tata Memorial Hospital (TMC) has released the official Clinical Research Coordinator Notification 2026 on its official website. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced under the TMC Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with a maximum age of 35 years and qualifications including M.Sc. in Life Science, M.Pharm with a Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research, or Pharm.D along with one year of clinical research experience can attend the walk-in interview on 14 July 2026. The official notification PDF and walkin interview details are available below.

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc in Life Science, M.Pharm with Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research, Pharm.D, One year experience in clinical research
qualification.details: M.Sc in Life Science, M.Pharm with Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research is Mandatory. Pharm.D. One year's Experience in clinical research is Mandatory.

content_sections.heading: TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Overview

rows.tmc_tata_memorial_hospital: M.Sc in Life Science, M.Pharm with Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research, Pharm.D, One year experience in clinical research

content_sections.heading: TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Clinical Research Coordinator Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Clinical Research Coordinator Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Clinical Research Coordinator Vacancy Details 2026
Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc in Life Science, M.Pharm with Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research is Mandatory. Pharm.D. One year's Experience in clinical research is Mandatory.

content_sections.heading: TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
Walk-In Procedure
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before attending the interview. Candidates must report at the venue as per the reporting time mentioned in the notification. Carry all original documents along with one set of self-attested photocopies such as ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates (if required), and category certificate (if applicable). Bring the duly filled application form if required in the notification. Verify eligibility criteria before attending the interview. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance to complete registration formalities. Keep extra passport-size photographs for submission if required.

content_sections.heading: TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Clinical Research Coordinator Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the Clinical Research Coordinator position at TMC Tata Memorial Hospital is scheduled for 14 July 2026. Candidates should ensure they report at the venue on this date.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Clinical Research Coordinator post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc in Life Science, M.Pharm with a Post Graduate Diploma in Clinical Research, or a Pharm.D. Additionally, one year of experience in clinical research is mandatory.

faq.question: Q3. What is the maximum age limit for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Clinical Research Coordinator post is 35 years. Age relaxation details, if any, would be available in the official notification.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Clinical Research Coordinator role?
faq.answer: The salary for the Clinical Research Coordinator position ranges from Rs. 34,000/- for the first year, increasing to Rs. 40,000/- for candidates with four or more years of experience.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for the TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive, as per the available information.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Clinical Research Coordinator position?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Clinical Research Coordinator role includes an MCQ Test, followed by an Interview, and finally, Document Verification.

faq.question: Q7. How should candidates apply for this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a walk-in recruitment. Eligible candidates need to report directly at the specified venue on the walk-in date with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. What documents should candidates carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the walk-in interview for TMC Tata Memorial Hospital Recruitment 2026 going to be held?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be held at TMC Tata Memorial Hospital, Mumbai, Maharashtra, 400012. Specific reporting time and exact venue details are in the official notification.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent or contractual job?
faq.answer: The job type for the Clinical Research Coordinator position at TMC Tata Memorial Hospital is contractual, as indicated in the recruitment details.
